PLX The Pullix Utility Token

The Pullix Token offers diverse utilities, encompassing staking rewards, fee reductions, and participation in Pullix DAO governance.

Benefits of PLX Token

Pullix Token holders benefit from an elevated user experience while utilizing the Pullix platform.

Discounted Trading Fees

Reduce your trading costs with PLX.

Exclusive VIP Benefits

Unlock custom-tailored trading conditions for VIPs.

Cashback

Receive higher cashback on your trading activity.

Rewards

Receive airdrops and exclusive bonuses.

Staking

Stake your PLX tokens and receive a fixed APR.

Governance

Stake PLX and vote on key Pullix developments.

What is PLX

PLX serves as the native token within the Pullix ecosystem, functioning as a utility token for the Pullix trading platform. It offers various advantages, including decentralized governance authority, staking rewards, trading incentives, fee reductions, and additional perks.

Key Attribute Value Proposition
Functionality PLX staking rewards, exclusive bonuses, airdrop incentives, trading fee discounts.
Governance Holders will be able to vote on important project developments.
Income You can create liquidity pairs or simple hold for passive income paid in PLX
Whitepaper

PLX Tokenomics

The Pullix token has a total fixed supply of 200 million tokens and is a deflationary token

Total supply

200M

Allocation Value Proposition Tokens
Presale 		60% 120,000,000
Marketing 		12% 24,000,000
Exchange Listings 		10% 20,000,000
Rewards 		10% 20,000,000

Transparency At Your Fingertips

Track the daily revenues generated by Pullix

Our users can track the daily gross revenue generated on our platform with ease by simply navigating to the dashboard. A percentage of the net revenues ranging from 10-30% is used to buy-back PLX and 50% of those tokens are burned weekly and the remaining 50% is redistributed as rewards.

Risk Warning
Before engaging with this Website and the Services made available through it, you should read all relevant Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, and accompanying documentation, which govern the Terms of Use and Service of all Pullix products and services.
Pullix products are complex financial instruments which come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. These products are not suitable for all investors. You should consider whether you understand how leveraged products work and whether you can afford to take the inherently high risk of losing your money. If you do not understand the risks involved, or if you have any questions regarding the Pullix products, you should seek independent financial and/or legal advice from a qualified professional.
CFDs are leveraged products that carry a high degree of risk, which can lead to potential gains or significant losses. Returns or profits may be subject to capital gains tax in your jurisdiction, for which you shall be entirely responsible.
Restricted Jurisdictions
You are not allowed to access or use our services if you are located, incorporated or otherwise established in, or a citizen or resident of the United States of America or other countries or territories where the activity shall be specially licensed or regulated. If you are traveling to prohibited countries or territories, you acknowledge that our services may not be available to you.
The content on this website is not intended for citizens or residents of the European Union, the wider European Economic Area or the United Kingdom
